subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Hearken unto the call of this Youth Who speaketh from the branches, that there is no God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا غلام الله استمع ندآء هذا الغلام الذی ینطق علی الافنان بانه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
